challenges.title: Responsive Card Layout
challenges.description: Create a responsive card layout that shows 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, and 3 on desktop.
challenges.instructions: Use CSS Grid with media queries. Start mobile-first.
hints: Use grid-template-columns with different values at breakpoints

challenges.title: Responsive Navigation with Hamburger Menu
challenges.description: Build a navigation bar that shows horizontal links on desktop and a hamburger menu on mobile.
challenges.instructions: Create a nav with flexbox for desktop, hide links and show hamburger button for mobile.
hints: Use flexbox for the nav layout
Show hamburger only on small screens with display:none/block
Use JavaScript or checkbox hack for toggle

challenges.title: Full Responsive Dashboard Layout
challenges.description: Create a dashboard with sidebar, header, main content area, and widgets that adapts across all device sizes.
challenges.instructions: Use CSS Grid for the overall layout. On mobile: single column. On tablet: two columns. On desktop: sidebar + main with widget grid.
hints: Use grid-template-areas for semantic layout naming
Define different grid-template-areas for each breakpoint
